name: Snipcart
description: Snipcart is a developer-first HTML/JS shopping cart platform that adds e-commerce to any website. Its REST API allows agents to manage orders, products, customers, discounts, refunds, notifications, and abandoned carts without a traditional e-commerce backend.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all completed orders with filtering by status, date range, and invoice number.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single order by token with all items, taxes, and payment details.

capabilities.name: orders_update
capabilities.description: Update order status, tracking information, or metadata.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of products tracked by Snipcart with sales statistics.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific product by ID.

capabilities.name: products_update
capabilities.description: Update product inventory and stock settings.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all customers who have placed orders.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific customer by ID.

capabilities.name: customers_orders_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all orders for a specific customer.

capabilities.name: discounts_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all discounts for your account.

capabilities.name: discounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new discount code or rule.

capabilities.name: refunds_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all refunds for an order.

capabilities.name: refunds_create
capabilities.description: Create a refund for an order.

capabilities.name: notifications_create
capabilities.description: Send a notification to an order customer.

capabilities.name: abandoned_carts_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve abandoned carts with filtering by time range and value.

capabilities.name: abandoned_carts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific abandoned cart by token.
